_comment: FALSE POSITIVE — SP-103001: Legitimate EDR/AV accessing LSASS for protection
scenario: CrowdStrike Falcon sensor accesses LSASS as part of its credential theft protection module — this is expected and benign
why_fp: Source is csrss.exe — Windows system process, not an attacker tool
AccessMask 0x1000 = PROCESS_QUERY_LIMITED_INFORMATION — read-only, not sufficient for full dump
Many EDR products (CrowdStrike, Defender, SentinelOne) legitimately access LSASS for protection
Known benign callers: csrss.exe, werfault.exe, lsm.exe, SecurityHealthService.exe
tuning_recommendation: Allowlist known benign SourceImage values: csrss.exe, werfault.exe, lsm.exe, wininit.exe
Allowlist EDR sensor processes by signing certificate (CrowdStrike, Defender, etc.)
Focus on GrantedAccess masks that enable full dump: 0x1410, 0x1438, 0x143A, 0xFFFF
